title: Guardrail Processing Flow
description: Safety guardrail checks on prompts and video outputs: running text and video guardrails with optional offloading
initialization_flow: START: __init__ called with disable_guardrail, offload_guardrail_models, has_text_input flags
DECISION: disable_guardrail == True? → SKIP all guardrail loading → END init path
DECISION: offload_guardrail_models == True? → SKIP eager loading (load lazily at runtime) → END init path
prompt_guardrail_flow: → is_safe == False? → log.critical('GUARDRAIL BLOCKED: {message}') → return False
DECISION: offload_guardrail_models == True? → YES: _offload_guardrail_models() (del, gc, cuda empty_cache)
video_guardrail_flow: → is_safe == False? → log.critical('GUARDRAIL BLOCKED: {message}') → return None
DECISION: offload_guardrail_models == True? → YES: _offload_guardrail_models() (del, gc, cuda empty_cache)
RETURN: video (np.ndarray) or None if blocked
offload_flow: _offload_guardrail_models(): del text_guardrail, del video_guardrail, gc.collect(), torch.cuda.empty_cache()
caller_usage_patterns: diffusion/world_generation_pipeline.py: is_safe = _run_guardrail_on_prompt_with_offload(prompt) → if not is_safe: skip generation
diffusion/world_generation_pipeline.py: video = _run_guardrail_on_video_with_offload(video) → if video is None: abort
autoregressive/world_generation_pipeline.py: same pattern for both prompt and video
diffusion/gen3c_pipeline.py: same pattern for both prompt and video
key_conditions: disable_guardrail=True → entire guardrail system bypassed at init and runtime
offload_guardrail_models=True → models NOT loaded at init; loaded just-in-time before each check then deleted after
offload_guardrail_models=False → models pre-loaded at init; stay in GPU memory throughout
has_text_input=True → text_guardrail loaded; False → only video_guardrail loaded
Prompt blocked → return False (caller skips generation)
Video blocked → return None (caller discards output)
video_guardrail_components: VideoContentSafetyFilter: content safety classifier for video frames
RetinaFaceFilter: face detection + blur postprocessor (runs only if video passes safety check)
important_notes: Two parallel guardrail tracks: (1) text/prompt guardrail using Blocklist+LlamaGuard3, (2) video guardrail using VideoContentSafetyFilter+RetinaFaceFilter face blur. Both support lazy offload mode (load→check→unload) for GPU memory management. A blocked prompt returns False (bool), a blocked video returns None. The RetinaFaceFilter runs as a postprocessor ONLY when video passes the safety check — it blurs faces rather than blocking. disable_guardrail=True bypasses everything.
